title: lasuroa 20pcs Nail Brushes Set, Silicone Gel Fingernail Brush Kit Double Ended Dotting Tool with Resin Nail Polish Pallet Mixing Palette and Pen Holder for Manicure Art Tray Design Painting
features: Product Included: You will receive 15 nail brushes, 5 double-ended dotting tools, 1 pen holder, and 1 resin nail polish palette, the complete quantity and functions are designed to meet your daily use and replacement needs.

Multi-functional Palette: Our nail polish mixing palette is made of quality resin with a smooth surface, which can be used to mix nail polish, acrylic makeup. Beautiful and atmospheric, it can be used as a manicure display tray.

Professional Pens: Our nail design tools are fully functional and can be used for dotting, brushing, and engraving, which are very suitable for creating various artistic nails such as floral patterns, gradient effects and acrylic engraving.

Easy to Clean: Our double ended dotting tools and resin palette are can be easily cleaned with water. Our nail brushes feature durable synthetic bristles, which should be rinsed immediately after use (avoid using irritating detergents) to maintain the effect of the bristles.

Wide Applications: In addition to manicure, our manicure tools can also be used for artistic creations such as clay sculpture. You can use them yourself or give them to professional manicurists and amateur manicure enthusiasts.
description: Product description Specification: Color: colorful Material: Resin, plastic Product Size: as shown in the picture Package details: 20 x nail brush 1 x nail polish palette 1 x pen holder Note: Due to manual measurement, the size and weight may have a certain error. Due to the difference between different monitors, there may be a slight color difference existed. Directions 1. For nail brushes, hold the brush at a 45-degree angle to the nail and use gentle, sweeping motions to apply and spread the polish. 2. Use the double-ended dotting tools for creating patterns and details by dotting polish onto the nail. 3. The resin palette can be used to mix polish or display nails during manicure.
